name: @aily-project/lib-sparkfun-i2c-gps
author: SparkFun
description: SparkFun I2C GPS Arduino 库 Blockly 封装，支持通过 I2C 读取 GPS NMEA 数据流。
description_zh_cn: SparkFun I2C GPS Arduino 库 Blockly 封装，支持通过 I2C 读取 GPS NMEA 数据流。
description_en: Blockly wrapper for SparkFun I2C GPS library, reads NMEA data over I2C.
